name: Milestone Swaddle Baby Blanket with Felt Frame - Multi Dot - Cloud Island™: Cotton Muslin, Classic Patterns, 47"
description:
Get your baby ready for a photoshoot and keep track of their growth with the Milestone Swaddle Baby Blanket with Felt Frame from cloud island™. This baby muslin blanket and frame set includes one polka-dot blanket and one with number of months — from one to 12 along with a felt frame to mark the month. Made from 100% cotton, the multicolor dot-print baby blanket pack helps keep them warm and feels oh-so soft against their sensitive skin.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
